_schema: v3 — 12-sector universe. current_month + rolling 12-month history. SKILL-04 appends to history on 1st of month.
_history_purpose: 2-consecutive-month exit rule, sector momentum trend, rotation pattern analysis

current_month.rotation_decision: NO ROTATION — CPSEETF remains #1 at 9.0. RSI cooled from 78.6 to 57.5 (healthy, not bearish — room to run). Top challengers: PHARMABEES (8.8), MODEFENCE (8.6, new), METALIETF (8.0, new). Rotation threshold not met.

scores.notes: ACTIVE SECTOR. RSI cooled from 78.6 (May 5) to 57.5 — healthy consolidation, not trend break. Price slipped from 108.01→106.70 on mild 2-day correction. Still +11.9% above 200-DMA, in top decile of 52-week range. DXY 98.90 = structural tailwind. Oil $111 = ONGC/OIL earnings boost. FII+DII both buying. CAPE 33 = favour value (CPSE = value play). Continue full ₹60K allocation.

Strong #2, gap narrowing (was 9.1 May 5, now 8.8). At 52-WEEK HIGH (24.82). RSI 75.6 bullish. Volume surge (ratio 1.36). US generic pharma cycle recovery, PLI tailwinds, rupee depreciation = export revenue boost. HOLD existing 2000 units. If CPSEETF target met early in month, add PHARMABEES. Next rotation candidate if CPSEETF drops below 8.5.

NEW IN UNIVERSE. Surprise #3 at 8.6. At 52-WEEK HIGH, +14.2% above 200-DMA. RSI 71.4 (bullish without being overbought). HAL/BEL/BEML record order books. India defence indigenisation push, export target ₹35,000 cr. India-Pakistan geopolitical tension = structural demand. Record budget defence allocation. NOT in active portfolio yet — strong candidate for next rotation if CPSEETF weakens.

NEW IN UNIVERSE. #4 at 8.0. At 52-WEEK HIGH, +21.8% above 200-DMA — strongest DMA outperformance in universe. China stimulus driving steel/copper/aluminium cycle. India domestic steel demand strong (infra push). RSI 66.4 — room to run. CYCLICAL RISK: China stimulus reversal or global demand softness = sharp drawdown. WATCH, do not act until CPSEETF rotation threshold triggered.

technical_detail.price_vs_200dma: N/A — insufficient history (~117 candles, ETF listed Nov 2025)

scores.notes: NEW IN UNIVERSE. #5 at 7.7. Limited history (Nov 2025 launch — 200DMA unavailable, scored neutral). Near 52-week high, RSI 74.5. Oil $111 = direct E&P earnings play (ONGC, Oil India). CAUTION: Heavy composition overlap with CPSEETF (both hold ONGC/OIL India). Not recommended while CPSEETF is active — would be redundant exposure. Revisit only if CPSEETF exits rotation.

NEW IN UNIVERSE. #6 at 7.6. Above both DMAs, RSI 62 (bullish). India govt capex record ₹11.1L cr budget. PM Gati Shakti, National Infrastructure Pipeline. Roads/rail/ports all accelerating. NOT in active portfolio — steady candidate if sector rotation opens up.

NEW IN UNIVERSE. #7 at 6.9. Above both DMAs, RSI 59 (healthy). Strong domestic 2-wheeler and PV demand. Rural recovery driving entry-level segments. Oil $111 = input cost pressure for OEMs. EV transition risk medium-term. Decent but not compelling vs CPSEETF/PHARMABEES. Not in active portfolio.

PREVIOUS ACTIVE SECTOR. Score held at 6.8 (unchanged from May 5 despite RSI recovery 35.5→49.5 — FII/DII score normalised). Price recovering: 94.14→96.45. Still below 50-DMA. Above 200-DMA = structural floor. HOLD ₹30,000/month (reduced per exit_alert). NPA cycle improving, PSU recap support. Conservative GTT triggers only — see feedback.

NEW IN UNIVERSE. #9 at 6.3. Below 200-DMA but strong 50-DMA recovery (+8.9%). India residential demand very strong — Prestige/DLF/Godrej record bookings. RSI 63 and volume surge (1.27) suggest accumulation. But 52-week position only 43.8% — still in recovery mode. Not compelling vs higher-ranked sectors.

HOLD. Score unchanged at 5.7. Improved vs April (RSI 40→52.9, 52w 38.6%→49.2%) but still below both DMAs. FII May reversal a positive signal. RBI rate cut cycle beginning = medium-term positive. Watch for recovery above 50-DMA ~578.62 as confirmation signal. No new allocation.

NEW IN UNIVERSE. #11 at 5.6. Marginally below 200-DMA, above 50-DMA. Insurance and NBFC recovery underway but mixed signals. Lower priority vs BANKBEES given similar exposure. Not in active portfolio.

✅ POSITION EXITED — 1500 units sold May 7, 2026 (3 sell orders: 1334+150+16 qty). 3rd consecutive month sub-4 (Mar: implied, Apr: 2.9, May: 2.1). DeepSeek structural disruption to IT demand + US tariff headwinds. Proceeds ~₹48,000 redeployed to CPSEETF GTT buys. No re-entry until score sustains above 6 for 2+ months.

fii_dii_data.signal: BOTH BUYING — major reversal from April. FII returned as net buyer on first day of May.

macro_context.source: Last known Apr 30 (Yahoo Finance rate-limited May 5)
macro_context.dxy_signal: BULLISH (below 100) — tailwind for CPSE real assets and EM inflows
macro_context.yield_spread_zone: 2-3% = FII cautious (but May 4 reversal signals improvement)
macro_context.oil_signal: HIGH — headwind for consumption/auto/banking but EARNINGS BOOST for CPSEETF (ONGC, OIL India, ENERGY ETF). Confirms CPSEETF over BANKBEES/AUTOBEES.
macro_context.valuation_overlay: ELEVATED CAPE — favour value/real-asset sectors. CPSEETF and METALIETF (value/commodity) preferred over high-PE IT/growth.

current_month.rotation_reason: PSUBNKBEES RSI dropped to 35.5 May 5, below 50-DMA, price pulled back 14% from Feb peak. CPSEETF at 52-week high with perfect technicals + oil tailwind + DXY tailwind.

history._note: May 2026 — updated May 7 with full 12-sector universe

exit_alerts.note: Position fully exited. Proceeds ~₹48,000 redeployed to CPSEETF GTT buys. No further action needed.

exit_alerts.action: Reduce allocation from ₹60,000 to ₹30,000/month. Redirect ₹30,000 to Large Cap (NIFTYBEES). Do NOT sell existing holdings — still HOLD range and above 200-DMA.
exit_alerts.conviction_note: Low personal conviction — use deep-dip GTT triggers only. Do not chase if fills missed.

watch_candidates.trigger_condition: Promote to active consideration if CPSEETF drops below 8.0 for 1 month
watch_candidates.note: Strongest new entrant. Defence cycle is multi-year structural theme.

watch_candidates.trigger_condition: Promote to active consideration if CPSEETF drops below 8.0 and METALIETF sustains above 7.5
watch_candidates.note: Strong technically but cyclical. China demand reversal = sharp risk. Treat as secondary candidate.

watch_candidates.trigger_condition: Only relevant if CPSEETF exits rotation — heavy overlap with CPSE holdings (ONGC, OIL)
watch_candidates.note: 200DMA unavailable due to short ETF history (launched Nov 2025).

_history_rules.updated_by: SKILL-04 on 1st of every month — append to history[], update current_month{}
_history_rules.sector_universe: 12 sectors as of May 2026: CPSEETF, PHARMABEES, MODEFENCE, METALIETF, ENERGY, INFRABEES, AUTOBEES, PSUBNKBEES, MOREALTY, BANKBEES, BFSI, ITBEES
_history_rules.critical_use: consecutive_below4 check: count how many months a sector appears in below4_sectors[] across history entries
